calendar.matters:
NOTICE OF HEARING AND TEMPORARY RESTRAINING ORDER (ELDER OR DEPENDENT ADULT ABUSE)
Off Calendar May-03-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: (See Word Minutes for this date)

NOTICE OF HEARING AND TEMPORARY RESTRAINING ORDER (ELDER OR DEPENDENT ADULT ABUSE)
Off Calendar Apr-14-2010 Reset To May-03-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204 For Order To Show Cause
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Civil Harassment OSC and TRO hearing this day.

Dept. 204, Judge Pro Tem: Sue Kaplan, Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda, CSR: Diana Chen, CSR #11312 Bailiff: Deputy V. Jung.

Daniel Redman, Esq. for and with Petitioner: Nelda Myers, who was present.

Jacob Harker, Esq. for the Respondent: Ferne Van Deusen, who was not present.

The Petitioner was sworn.

Mr. Harker requested a continuance stating that this case is intertwined with case number PES-10-293352 and that he would like additional time to speak with Counsel. In addition, he stated that his client resides out of state and that he has a letter from his client's doctor stating that she is unable to travel. Discussions were held regarding the pending petition in case number PES-10-293352. The Court granted Mr. Harker's request for a continuance over Petitioner's objections and continued the matter to May 3, 2010 at 9:00 am in Department 204 to be heard with the related matter PES-10-293352.

A reissuance of the TRO was granted to May 3, 2010 (order signed).
